atlas:status: cd backend && atlas migrate status --env local --config file://atlas.hcl --var db_url="${MEMORY_DATABASE_URL:-postgres://chatagent:chatagent@127.0.0.1:7753/chatagent?sslmode=disable}"
atlas:apply: cd backend && atlas migrate apply --env local --config file://atlas.hcl --var db_url="${MEMORY_DATABASE_URL:-postgres://chatagent:chatagent@127.0.0.1:7753/chatagent?sslmode=disable}"
atlas:lint: cd backend && atlas migrate lint --env local --config file://atlas.hcl --var db_url="${MEMORY_DATABASE_URL:-postgres://chatagent:chatagent@127.0.0.1:7753/chatagent?sslmode=disable}" --latest 1
